application.titleMax: Job title may be at most 200 characters.

application.urlScheme: The job ad link must start with http:// or https://.
application.coverLetterMax: The cover letter may be at most 5,000 characters.
application.noteMax: The note may be at most 1,000 characters.

application.batchTooMany: At most 100 applications per bulk action.
application.batchConflict: The same application appears with different target statuses.

profile.newPasswordTooShort: New password must be at least 12 characters.
profile.displayNameMax: Display name may be at most 200 characters.

resume.endBeforeStart: The end date cannot be before the start date.
resume.institutionMax: Institution may be at most 200 characters.

resume.summaryMax: The summary may be at most 2,000 characters.
resume.cvNameRequired: A name for the CV is required.
